mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive return frequency drops below 55% during rate cut periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 8.0 percent, labor market slack signals severe demand contraction, causing equity markets to price in recessionary earnings cuts and producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns remain positive in >60% of instances where UNRATE crosses above 8.0%, or signal loses predictive power after 2012.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and business confidence, driving positive equity returns as corporate revenue expectations rise.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to produce a positive return frequency above 58% over any 24-month window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indexes signal improving manufacturing capacity utilization, which generates short-term positive equity returns specifically during early-cycle recovery phases.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases yield negative 5-day forward returns in >55% of observations during confirmed early-cycle periods, or Rank IC turns negative.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation erodes real corporate profit margins and forces tighter financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL increases correlate with positive 20-day forward returns in >60% of monthly observations over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly nonfarm payroll additions exceeding 200 thousand signal robust labor demand, which supports consumer spending forecasts and drives positive equity returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in >50% of months where payroll growth surpasses the 200k threshold, or the signal decays to zero IC after 2013.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent GDP growth acceleration and federal funds rate declines create a favorable growth-at-a-reasonable-price environment, generating positive forward equity returns as earnings expand alongside lower discount rates.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative returns in >55% of quarterly observations, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below the 90.0 index level indicates severe manufacturing contraction, which triggers negative equity returns as investors anticipate recessionary earnings revisions.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns remain positive in >60% of observations when INDPRO drops below 90.0, or the signal fails to predict direction in walk-forward tests.
